feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to related files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing pre-written summaries for various frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles with custom CSS variables defining theme colors for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Basic HTML shell mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React router configuration defining all app routes wrapped in MockStoreProvider.
frontend/src/components/ai/FloatingAIBut: Floating button that navigates to the AI assistant screen.
frontend/src/components/editor/AddQuesti: Dialog for creating a new question heading with title and planned question count input.
frontend/src/components/editor/FloatingR: Draggable floating toolbox for selecting sections, headings, and adding typed questions in the real paper editor.
frontend/src/components/editor/MobileRea: Provides a draggable mobile FAB toolbox for selecting sections, headings, and adding different question types to a paper.
frontend/src/components/editor/RealPaper: Renders a desktop toolbox with section selection and buttons to add various question types to the selected section.
Shows a spotlight tutorial highlighting the real paper toolbox, positioning a callout near the detected toolbox element.
Defines the app layout, navigation handling, authentication redirects, and displays coachmark overlays around main routed content.
frontend/src/components/navigation/Navig: Implements the sidebar navigation with links, profile info, paper creation, and logout actions.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Coach: Displays a contextual onboarding overlay that highlights a target element and shows navigation controls for tutorial steps.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperActio: Provides an overflow actions menu for papers, including print, PDF export, sharing, and preview navigation.
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperRende: Renders question content in various formats (MCQ, numerical, fill‑in‑blank, true/false, match pairs, etc.).
frontend/src/components/paper/PaperSurfa: Displays a full paper layout with header and editable or read-only question sections, including autofocus and navigation helpers.
frontend/src/components/paper/QuestionBl: Provides editing UI for different question types, handling text updates, blanks, options, and deletion.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCoachmarks.ts: Manages onboarding coachmark steps, controlling activation, navigation between steps, and completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedEffect.ts: Implements a debounced effect hook to delay running an effect until dependencies stop changing.
frontend/src/hooks/useDraggableFloatingP: Provides a hook for draggable UI panels with optional viewport constraints and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity auth context using Dfinity AuthClient with login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useRealPaperToolboxSp: Tracks whether a toolbox spotlight has been completed using localStorage and exposes show/complete/reset states.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.ts: Manages light/dark/system theme selection with persistence and applies theme changes to the document.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind-based global styles, theme variables, dark mode tokens, paper print styles, and layout rules.
frontend/src/lib/ai/mockQuestionGenerato: Generates deterministic mock questions based on topic, marks, difficulty, and style using predefined templates.
frontend/src/lib/editor/sectionInsertCon: Stores and retrieves section insertion context in localStorage for inserting questions into paper sections.
frontend/src/lib/ocr/mockOcrExtractor.ts: Creates deterministic mock OCR question extraction sessions and utilities for storing, loading, and converting them.
frontend/src/lib/papers/createNewPaper.t: Creates a new paper object with defaults derived from the user profile.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and the Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/pages/ai/AIPreferencesWiref: UI for generating, editing, selecting, and inserting AI‑generated questions into a paper section using mock data and insert context.
frontend/src/pages/auth/LoginWireframe.t: Login page providing Internet Identity or guest login and redirecting based on onboarding state.
Loads and displays locally stored drafts with error handling and navigation options when empty or failed.
frontend/src/pages/editor/PaperEditorWir: Main paper editor allowing editing of paper metadata and sections with autosave via debounced updates.
frontend/src/pages/editor/QuestionEntryW: Form to create a new personal question and insert it into the matching section of a paper.
frontend/src/pages/editor/RealPaperEdito: Full paper editor enabling section/heading selection, question creation by type, and autosaving real paper content.
frontend/src/pages/export/ExportPrintPre: Provides a print preview and layout mode selection for a paper, with options to clean up formatting or revert to original.
frontend/src/pages/home/HomeDashboardWir: Displays a teacher dashboard with quick actions, recent papers, and navigation to the editor and other tools.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRReviewApproveW: Loads extracted OCR questions for review, editing, approval, and insertion into the question bank.
frontend/src/pages/ocr/OCRUploadWirefram: Handles file upload and mock OCR extraction, then saves the session and navigates to the review screen.
frontend/src/pages/onboarding/Onboarding: Shows an onboarding screen with an interactive tutorial option and completes onboarding before navigating home.
frontend/src/pages/papers/GeneratedPaper: Lists generated papers with options to edit, export, or delete, and handles navigation to related views.
frontend/src/pages/profile/ProfileWirefr: Form page for editing and saving teacher profile defaults using mock store and navigation.
frontend/src/pages/questionBank/Question: Displays starter and personal questions with tab navigation and supports inserting questions into a paper section.
frontend/src/pages/settings/SettingsWire: Settings page allowing theme selection, tutorial reset, and clearing stored data.
frontend/src/state/mockData.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and sample data for profiles, questions, papers, and defaults.
frontend/src/state/mockStore.tsx: React context store handling persistence, profile updates, question and paper management, and onboarding state.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, colors, fonts, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Defines the current state of the Caffeine AI project, listing theme and Draft tab issues plus related feature and fix requests. Tracks existing features, pending requests, project metadata, and version info.
